programme.title: Top Chef S17
programme.desc: In a Top Chef first, the final five travel to one of the top culinary destinations in the world - Italy. First the chefs must make an apertivo for 30 locals from the town of Lucca that pairs perfectly with a Peroni beer. Then, they have the experience of a chef’s lifetime, hunting the elusive white truffle which they must use in a dish for a Tuscan food festival. There’s no room for error, as the chefs are making dishes for not just Tom, Padma and Gail but avant-garde Italian Chef Cristiano Tomei, Truffle expert Cristiano Savini and a host of locals.

programme.title: Ben 10 S1
programme.desc: Dr. Animo has made a scary transformation and found a way to release the very dangerous animal nature of humans, including Max's life-long friend!

programme.title: Ben 10 S1
programme.desc: Ben discovers Steam Smythe excavating a 'House of the Future' built by Max's childhood idol, in search of a powerful device that will allow him to create devastating weapons for his war on progress.

programme.title: Ben 10 S1
programme.desc: While Ben, Gwen and Max hike to a waterfall, the Bugg Brothers are back with a plan to duplicate Diamondhead, but their cloning ray gun fires on Max instead, multiplying him endlessly.

programme.title: Ben 10 S1
programme.desc: Ben, Gwen and Max revisit their favourite amusement park, renovated and rebranded as AdrenaWORLD. Unfortunately, the new management is Zombozo and his trio of new henchmen!

programme.title: Ben 10 S1
programme.desc: Ben and his arch-enemy, Billy Billions, clash in a duel for supremacy at the world's largest Laser Tag Park, Laser Town when Billy inadvertently ignites a robot rebellion.

programme.title: Ben 10 S1
programme.desc: Ben's holiday to Portland is cut short when he discovers an 11th alien while battling a Dr. Animo Mega-Creature and damages his Omnitrix in a fight.

programme.title: Ben 10 S2
programme.desc: While on a visit to Cape Canaveral, the Tennyson Trio attends the inaugural launch of an experimental space plane. When Vilgax commandeers the ship, Ben must stop him from weaponising the shuttle.

programme.title: Ben 10 S2
programme.desc: After stumbling upon a cute cat-dog-rabbit creature hybrid, or 'Cadobbit', Ben ignores Grandpa Max's advice and sneaks the animal onto the Rustbucket, but is soon in over his head as it turns on him.

programme.title: Ben 10 S2
programme.desc: Ben and Billy Billions go head-to-head over a Sumo Slammer Set sold exclusively inside the world's largest shopping centre, only to find six-year-old Simon Sez has gotten to it first.

programme.title: Ben 10 S2
programme.desc: Aboard the SS Pettigrew on its final voyage, Ben must battle seasickness as well as Steam Smythe, who looks to use his mechanical creatures to sink the steamship's modern replacement.

programme.title: Ben 10 S2
programme.desc: With new Omni-Enhancements in tow, Ben plans on saving a town from a sudden mudslide, but his heroics are short-lived once Vilgax appears to warn him about the Omnitrix's mysterious new alien.

programme.title: Ben 10 S2
programme.desc: After discovering that Vilgax has joined forces with the Weatherheads, Ben must not only overcome his doubts, but must also fully embrace his new powers if he is to beat his foes.

programme.title: Ben 10 S2
programme.desc: When their attempt to get a photo with every storefront mascot is foiled, Ben and Gwen sneak out to get a snap with a wooden bear totem known as 'Yawk' only to find all the mascots have come to life.

programme.title: Ben 10 S2
programme.desc: When a cavity forces Ben to consult a dentist, his day gets worse when the mean magician Hex uses a dreamcatcher to bring Ben's fears to life and transports them both to a nightmarish dreamscape.

programme.title: Ben 10 S2
programme.desc: When the Rustbucket must have a tune-up in the same town as Zombozo's latest campaign trail stop, Ben discovers the clown is using his speeches to hypnotise and rob the town.

programme.title: Ben 10 S2
programme.desc: As the Tennysons dig up dinosaur fossils in the Badlands, Ben is unaware that Vilgax and Dr. Amino have teamed up to steal alien DNA from the Omnitrix. Vilgax then double-crosses his fellow villain.

programme.title: Ben 10 S2
programme.desc: During a live feed of the new transcontinental bullet train, La Grange enters the picture to outrace the train, but Ben joins in on the fun and will stop at nothing to come out on top!

programme.desc: After Max dozes off before a double feature, Ben and Gwen are left to save the drive-in on their own when evil magician Hex brings the film monster 'That' to life and unleashes it on the cinemagoers.

programme.title: Tad, the Lost Explorer, and the Secret of King Midas
programme.desc: Tad travels to Las Vegas to see his friend Sara’s latest discovery – a papyrus who turns everything he touches into gold.

programme.title: Top Chef S17
programme.desc: It’s Restaurant Wars and this season Padma takes all the limitations off the table as the chefs can make as much food as they want and shop wherever they choose. The two winning chefs from last week’s concept challenge are given 48 hours to pick their teams and make the restaurants they pitched come to life.

programme.title: Top Chef S17
programme.desc: The chefs head to the mountains, a few hours outside of Los Angeles to go to Summer Camp where they are challenged to an outdoor grilling Quickfire for Padma and “Top Chef” Kentucky winner Kelsey Barnard Clark. Before the sun rises, the chefs get to work on an upscale brunch buffet for 200 moms vacationing at the camp using a very limited stock pantry. It’ll take more than s’mores and a round of kumbayas to impress the moms, the judges Tom, Padma and Gail, and guest judge “Top Chef” Charleston Winner Brooke Williamson.

programme.title: Top Chef S17
programme.desc: With only six chefs remaining, the challenges get even more difficult, when pastry super-chef Sherry Yard awaits the All Stars for a dreaded dessert Quickfire, made even more impossible when chefs must endure a blindfolded taste test to pick their ingredients. Then Michelin-starred Chefs/Restaurateurs Niki and Carole Lidi-Nakayama demonstrate a traditional Japanese Kaiseki meal, the ultimate in simplicity, restraint and precision. The chefs must make this formidable dinner for not just these Kaiseki masters, but in celebration of the Tokyo games with Olympic medalists Diana Taurasi, Rai Benjamin, Nastia Liukin, Ibtihaj Muhammad, Christian Coleman, Kerri Walsh Jennings and NBC Olympic Primetime Host Mike Tirico. The gold medal meal takes place at the iconic Los Angeles Coliseum with Padma, Tom, Nilou Motamed and Niki & Carole Lidi-Nakayama at the judges table.

programme.title: The National Dog Show ('20)
programme.desc: From the Kennel Club of Philadelphia, this cherished competition for all dog lovers returns for the 17th year. Hosted by John O'Hurley, the event features 2,000 of the nation's leading canines, including the world’s largest, smallest and most exotic. Over 170 breeds strut their stuff with the hope of becoming this year's top dog. “The Dean” David Frei provides expert show commentary, and Mary Carillo chimes in as an adept sideline reporter for this ultimate canine showdown. But which dog will have their day, and which will leave with their tail between their legs? After all, there can only be one “Best in Show”.

programme.title: Journey to the Center of the Earth
programme.desc: Trapped in a cave, a trio’s only hope of escape is to go deep into the center of the Earth as they race against a volcanic eruption to reach the surface.

programme.title: Head of State
programme.desc: Chris Rock stars in this hilarious political comedy, as he finds himself plucked from obscurity and running for President of the United States!

programme.title: 15 Minutes

programme.desc: Based on webtoon, the series follows a woman who goes on a blind date, meets two charming guys, and navigates her feelings to discover true love.

programme.title: Our Universe
programme.desc: Following the accidental death of their older siblings, two in-laws who share a mutual dislike become the guardians of their 20-month-old nephew, Woo-joo.

programme.title: Crazy Tour
programme.desc: 4 mad men, starving for dopamine and thrills, are setting off in search of the 'craziest' challenges hidden around the world.

programme.title: Fresh off the Sea in Calape
programme.desc: Yum Jung-ah, Park Jun-myun, Dex, and Kim Hye-yoon team up for a brand-new chemistry you won’t want to miss. Get ready for another flavorful adventure!

programme.title: Rented in Finland
programme.desc: Lee Je-hoon, Lee Dong-hwi, Cha Eun-woo, and Kwak Dong-yeon will leave their urban lives behind to experience the serene and picturesque rural life in Finland.

programme.title: Chansung's Cooking
programme.desc: 2PM’s Chansung will explore different restaurants, taste popular menus and recreate them with his own recipes!

programme.title: One Night Food Trip- International Edition
programme.desc: Stay tuned to this spin-off of “One Night Food Trip” toured by Korean and local celebrities and find out the delicacies you can't miss in different Asian countries!

programme.title: Rambo: Last Blood
programme.desc: John Rambo's peaceful life is interrupted when Gabriela, his friend's granddaughter, disappears in Mexico. He decided to free her from the clutches of local cartels, starting a cycle of revenge

programme.title: Final Justice
programme.desc: A cop relies on a young car thief to take down four gangsters who plan to rob a rich merchant

programme.title: Mojin: The Lost Legend
programme.desc: Three grave robbers explore a lost underground kingdom to find a powerful charm.

programme.title: Diva
programme.desc: Due to a car accident, hidden ambitions and envy between two friends surfaces, driving a diving diva towards madness as she struggle to keep her elite status

programme.title: The Battle: Roar To Victory
programme.desc: Over a 4 day period, a fierce battle takes place between Korean independence militias and Japanese forces in Manchuria, China.

programme.title: My Lucky Stars
programme.desc: Undercover cop enlists his childhood friends to travel to Japan to help him catch a Yakuza group.

programme.title: Peppermint
programme.desc: Five years after her family is murdered, a housewife strengthen herself in order to bring justice to her family.

programme.title: Pee Nak 3
programme.desc: A young gravedigger at Thamma Nakanimitr temple, unearths an ancient gold anklet from a tomb dated back to World War II. He decided to pocket the anklet and falls prey to a curse that turns his skin scaly, the likes of a snake.

programme.title: Brothers in Heaven

programme.title: Cz12
programme.desc: A man searches the world for a set of mystic artifacts. The twelve bronze heads of the animals from the Chinese zodiac.

programme.title: Black Warrant
programme.desc: A semi-retired special ops assassin and a DEA agent cross paths on separate missions to stop a cyber terrorist organization that has built a dangerous machine threatening to attack the power grid and bring catastrophe to the world.

programme.title: Secret Zoo
programme.desc: A lawyer and zookeepers disguised themselves as animals in order to save a zoo from getting shut down.

programme.title: The Bad Guys: Reign of Chaos
programme.desc: After a group of criminals manage to escape while being transported, the police decided to regroup a special team which consists of prisoners to help track and return them to prison.

programme.desc: Examine '60s ad men and women and how they used wit and irony to reach a new audience, consequently revolutionizing the industry.

programme.title: The Real Mad Men of Advertising
programme.desc: See how stricter rules and public mistrust inspired 1970s advertisers to create some of history's greatest campaigns.

programme.title: The Real Mad Men of Advertising
programme.desc: See how advertisers used a new optimism and new technology to sell big in the "Greed is Good" era.

programme.title: Gameplay: The Story of the Videogame Revolution
programme.desc: Gameplay is a feature on the history of videogames. From Pong to Pac Man, Super Mario to Lara Croft, Doom, Grand Theft Auto and beyond, we chronicle the remarkable story of the fastest evolving new media of all time.

programme.title: WTF is Crypto?
programme.desc: In this episode, we explore the foundations of Cryptocurrency and talk to the local crypto pioneers who risked it all.

programme.title: WTF is Crypto?
programme.desc: Now we know why Crypto is such a big deal, through this episode we’ll meet the family behind one of NZ’s biggest Crypto success stories. We’ll dispel some crypto myths and cover the basics of how to get on board.

programme.title: WTF is Crypto?
programme.desc: CEO Aaron McDonald and Co-Founder Brooke Howard-Smith tell us how they created a multi-million dollar NFT business here in Aotearoa and are collaborating with international superstars.

programme.title: Artist to Icon
programme.desc: Features interviews with Whitney Houston’s The Bodyguard director Mick Jackson, musician Wayne Linsey, The Preacher’s Wife producer Elliot Abbott, plus many more.

programme.title: Artist to Icon
programme.desc: Features interviews with Tom Cruise’s stunt coordinator Wade Eastwood, Taps co-star Billy Van Zandt, Interview With The Vampire producer Stephen Woolley, plus many more.

programme.title: P!nk: Fearless
programme.desc: Pink is a powerhouse of pop and rock music. Although initially seen as yet another act in the late 90’s crowd of teen pop acts, she has since gone on to define her own genre and solidified her place as a standout from the rest. She is a force to be reckoned with in the music scene.

programme.title: Air Warriors S10
programme.desc: Watch the massive military transport aircraft C-5 Galaxy come up big time and again over its five decades of service

programme.title: Aerial Italy
programme.desc: From the engineering wonders of ancient Rome to the bloody medieval battles of Tuscany, and the colossal marble quarries of Carrara, journey across Central Italy and discover it like never before - from the air.

programme.title: WTF is Crypto?
programme.desc: In this episode, we explore the foundations of Cryptocurrency and talk to the local crypto pioneers who risked it all.

programme.title: The Real Mad Men of Advertising
programme.desc: Examine '60s ad men and women and how they used wit and irony to reach a new audience, consequently revolutionizing the industry.

programme.title: The Real Mad Men of Advertising
programme.desc: See how stricter rules and public mistrust inspired 1970s advertisers to create some of history's greatest campaigns.

programme.title: The Real Mad Men of Advertising
programme.desc: See how advertisers used a new optimism and new technology to sell big in the "Greed is Good" era.

programme.title: Wild Portugal
programme.desc: Rivers are lifelines in Wild Portugal, connecting mountains to the sea. Discover the Deer stag, frogs' spring rituals, and Grebes' dances, along with other animals and landscapes along these vital waterways.

programme.title: Wild Portugal
programme.desc: Portugal’s coastal waters and the Azores archipelago boast rich ecosystems. Explore the diverse species living in these waters and discover their unique lives in this revealing episode.

programme.title: Taiwan Top 5
programme.desc: Peggy explores top-notch breads and pastries from Taiwan. She talks with award-winning bakers and learns what makes their creations worth the recognition.

programme.title: Taiwan Top 5
programme.desc: Peggy explores the top five hidden functions of convenience stores in Taiwan. She tours around a convenience store in her neighborhood and discovers that it's more than just a place to grab coffee and snacks.

programme.title: Taiwan Top 5
programme.desc: Jolie explores Taiwan's top fruits, from pineappples to wax apples. She learns all about these fruits and why they can be enjoyed all year-round.

programme.title: Taiwan Top 5
programme.desc: Join Jolie on an exotic adventure into the world of Animals in Taiwan!

programme.title: Taiwan Top 5
programme.desc: Join host Jolie as she unravels the secrets of Taiwan nightlife in this captivating episode of Taiwan Top 5.

programme.title: Taiwan Top 5
programme.desc: Peggy explores Taiwan's top five alternative therapies and learns about those keeping traditional ways of healing alive today.

programme.title: Taiwan Top 5
programme.desc: Jolie explores top five temples to visit in Taipei. Join her as she learns about the deities worshipped in these temples and what people pray for at each.

programme.title: Taiwan Top 5
programme.desc: Peggy explores Taiwan's top five unique street foods. She tries to make some and learns what makes each of them so special.

programme.title: Around the World with Manu Feildel
programme.desc: Manu Feildel has a dream to follow in the footsteps of Jules Vernes’ Around the World in 80 days. So Manu sets himself a challenge to circumnavigate the world, through his food loving eyes. Will he make it? First stop - London.

programme.title: Around the World with Manu Feildel
programme.desc: Manu arrives in Dubai after London and is quick to dig up as much culinary experience in Dubai so he sets off to the spice souk, fish markets and a local pastry kitchen.

programme.title: Destination Flavour: Japan
programme.desc: Adam Liaw discovers a host of delights in Japan. On the wintry northern island of Hokkaido, he samples sea urchin, pond smelt and boutique cheesecake.

programme.title: Destination Flavour: Japan
programme.desc: Adam goes to sea with the fishermen who caught the so-called `million-dollar tuna'. He also meets a soy sauce maker who saved his staff from the 2011 tsunami.

programme.title: Destination Flavour: Japan
programme.desc: Adam Liaw continues his culinary tour of Japan, preparing fresh sushi and taking a trip to his wife's hometown to indulge in a little home cooking.

programme.title: Destination Flavour: Japan
programme.desc: Adam Liaw continues his culinary pilgrimage in Japan, devouring some of the finest miso, Nagoya chicken and Wagyu beef, and meeting a 74-year-old abalone diver.

programme.title: Destination Flavour: Japan
programme.desc: In the vast urban sprawl of Tokyo, Adam Liaw explores a food culture that not only sustains the `salaryman' workers in style but retains culinary traditions.

programme.title: Destination Flavour: Japan
programme.desc: Adam Liaw checks out the restaurants of food-crazy Tokyo and taste's some interesting dishes including Yakitori made from the reproductive organs of chickens.

programme.title: Around the World with Manu Feildel
programme.desc: Manu is in India for the first time in his life and wants to discover as much food as he can handle. From an Idli making lesson to a workout in the flower markets of Kolkata. Will he make it to Hong Kong on time and in one piece?

programme.title: Around the World with Manu Feildel
programme.desc: Manu heads to Hong Kong, the fourth country on his around the world tour, and he has some great food excursions lined up. Chicken feet, Tim Ho Wan, street food and lots to fit in before he jumps across the pond to Tokyo, Japan.

programme.title: Around the World with Manu Feildel
programme.desc: As Manu heads past his halfway mark on his journey around the world, he heads to Tokyo to explore the bustling city. It is a massive challenge and he is having the time of his life but how is that budget going?

programme.title: Boss Baby: Back in Business
programme.desc: Turtleneck wants to crack the Stinkless Serum formula and makes it a competition, pitting worker babies against worker babies, stating that the first one to the Serum will be the new CEO!

programme.title: The Epic Tales of Captain Underpants
programme.desc: Stuck in separate camps, Harold and George unleash a hyperintelligent talking possum to scare the pants off of Krupp. What could possibly go wrong?

programme.title: The Epic Tales of Captain Underpants
programme.desc: Eager to get the campers out of his hair, Krupp orders them to climb Plummet Peak, where a terrifying creature is rumored to reside.

programme.title: The Epic Tales of Captain Underpants
programme.desc: Harold and George don't ask for much -- just a fun scavenger hunt that doesn't include doing Krupp's errands. Careful what you wish for, fellas.

programme.title: Dragon 9 Realms S2
programme.desc: Tom and the riders “borrow” the bathysphere to rescue a dragon from the depths of the Giant Realm Sea.

programme.title: Dragon 9 Realms S2
programme.desc: While punished, Tom must sneak out to rescue the Riders from Buzzsaw.

programme.title: Dragon 9 Realms S2
programme.desc: Tom orchestrates a “safe” tour of the realms to convince Olivia that the Hidden World is safe for them to explore.

programme.title: Kung Fu Panda: The Paws of Destiny
programme.desc: When the kids grow over-confident after beginning their training, they decide to intercept a distress call and sneak off without permission, only to land themselves in hot water

programme.title: Kung Fu Panda: The Paws of Destiny
programme.desc: Po and the kids are recruited to perform in Mei Mei's theatrical show, but things take a turn when Jindiao ruins the play in order to find a mystical scroll

programme.title: Kung Fu Panda: The Paws of Destiny
programme.desc: When Jindiao arrives to the Village, he invites the kids to participate in an exhibition match, but has alternative motives

programme.title: Trollhunters: Tales of Arcadia
programme.desc: Jim warms up to the idea of being the Trollhunter until he faces Bular, who is determined to destroy him, so he seeks help in Blinky and AAARRRGGHH!!

programme.title: Trollhunters: Tales of Arcadia
programme.desc: Jim is not welcomed by the Trolls as their new Trollhunter, and he suffers a humiliating defeat at the hands of Draal

programme.title: Trollhunters: Tales of Arcadia
programme.desc: Jim undertakes his first Trollhunting mission by starting small: he must shrink down to eight inches tall to apprehend a mischievous gnome.

programme.title: Fast & Furious: Spy Racers
programme.desc: The kids manage to make it through the crazy storm and build gliders out of parts of the fallen spy plane to travel closer to Cleve’s base and save Nowhere and Gary. Cleve sees the kids on his satellite feeds and sends a bunch of drones to take them out. During the aerial battle, Cisco splits off and leads the drones away so that the rest of the crew can escape, causing him to be lost alone in the giant storm

programme.title: Fast & Furious: Spy Racers
programme.desc: The kids hatch a plan to take down Cleve and rescue Ms. Nowhere and Gary. Meanwhile, despite interference from Ziri, Cleve successfully begins to launch his satellites into space, which will allow him to use his weather machine to destroy Earth’s major cities and transform the Sahara into the only oasis. In order to stop the satellites, the team engages in an all-out battle against Cleve, Matsuo, and Rafaela. Just when it looks like our guys have the upperhand, Cleve shows them he has one last trick up his sleeve – a mech suit!

programme.title: Fast & Furious: Spy Racers
programme.desc: Cleve has the team surrounded – is this the end? Suddenly, Cisco bursts in to save the day, along with all of the friends the team has made along the way in the Sahara. Working together, they manage to stop Cleve’s missiles and defeat Rafaela and Matsuo. But before they get a chance to celebrate, a giant fire tornado tears its way through the Sahara destroying everything in its path. Tony decides to make one last daring attempt in order to save the day.

programme.title: Wizards: Tales of Arcadia
programme.desc: Douxie, Claire, Steve and Jim meet the legendary King Arthur and his sister, Morgana, in medieval Camelot — where being a troll is punishable by death.

programme.title: Wizards: Tales of Arcadia
programme.desc: With the future at stake, Douxie and Claire cling to the hope that Arthur and Morgana can reconcile. Meanwhile, humans are hunting trolls in the woods.

programme.title: Wizards: Tales of Arcadia
programme.desc: Merlin leads his ragtag crew on a quest to restore Excalibur and save Camelot. Elsewhere, Jim tries to convince Blinky that they're on the same side.

programme.title: Turbo F.A.S.T.
programme.desc: Turbo takes Beakless under his wing during a battle of snails vs. birds; Chet is Sheriff of a western Turbotown and fights a gang of outlaw crickets.

programme.title: Turbo F.A.S.T.
programme.desc: Skidmark competes with rich snail Shellsworth to build a railroad; Turbo and Chet roadtrip with their trucker dad and protect their cargo from bandits.

programme.title: Archibald's Next Big Thing is Here!
programme.desc: Archibald accidentally volunteers a rag-tag group of Crackridge locals in an important game of Crackarack against Saddlerock. / When Mayor Fowler is away for the day, Archibald assumes Brock is now the Mayor of Crackridge.

programme.title: Archibald's Next Big Thing is Here!
programme.desc: Archibald can’t wait to celebrate his Hatch Day with his family inside an impossibly fun theme park. But when Archibald accidentally gets sprayed by a skunk, he must try to get rid of his stank before his special day is ruined. / When Archibald overhears something suspicious about a neighbor, he reports it to his aunts who run the Neighborhood Bird Watch. With Archibald as their new recruit, they attempt to expose the neighbor’s suspicious shenanigans.

programme.title: Spirit Riding Free: Riding Academy
programme.desc: The PALs run into their old rivals the BUDs on the first day of classes, prompting Lucky to run for class rep. Elsewhere, Abigail helps solve a mystery.

programme.title: Voltron: Legendary Defender
programme.desc: With Zarkon consumed by his hunt for Lotor, Voltron gathers their coalition and prepares to strike in hopes of demolishing the evil Empire

programme.title: Team Zenko Go
programme.desc: When easily-distracted Luis is tasked with getting flowers for his grandmother's birthday party, TZG secretly keeps him on track. / When Rodney's honey bees escape from their apiary (artificial beehive), TZG secretly brings them back.

programme.title: Veggietales: In the House
programme.desc: Beau Rockley drives Bob and Larry apart when he interferes with their TV show /Granny Asparagus offers to bake cookies for Larry, Jimmy, and Jerry if they can look after her cherry cat.

programme.title: Veggietales: In the House
programme.desc: Larry and Bob make trading cards of everyone in the house, but Bob feels sad when no one wants his card./Motato invents a grow-ray and uses it to become a giant. It's up to Ultra Veggie Bob and Plantasaurus Larry to stop him.

programme.title: Not Quite Narwhal
programme.desc: Kelps learns about memory spark in an attempt to relive a memory of his grandmother. / Kelp and the underwater gang put on a show to showcase their imaginary sparks. As she practices, however, Scallop becomes convinced her tusk has a real spark!

programme.title: Not Quite Narwhal
programme.desc: Kelp is excited to celebrate his right of passage, breaking the ice with his horn. But when he struggles to break the ice like other narwhals, he is determined to do it “the Kelp way.”

programme.title: Gabby's Dollhouse
programme.desc: When Gabby unboxes beakers filled with a magical potion, they conjure up an invite for Spa Day at the dollhouse! However, while decorating for MerCat's favorite day of the year, MerCat accidentally loses her color and sparkle. Gabby and Pandy must help her get her sparkle back for the big Spa Day party!

programme.title: Gabby's Dollhouse
programme.desc: The dollhouse delivery is a special plant called an Itty Bitty Blossom that goes from newborn to full-grown in one day. Gabby and Pandy have to take care of the whiny and fussy growing Itty Bitty Blossom and make sure it is in its permanent soil spot before it's fully grown.

programme.title: Dragons: Rescue Riders
programme.desc: The Riders have to save Elbone when he's swallowed by a giant Sea Gronckle, and Dak's awful cooking might be just the thing to do it.

programme.title: Dragons: Rescue Riders
programme.desc: At a big town festival, Magnus challenges Duggard in a competition to be chief of Huttsgalor! Can the Riders help their friend keep his helmet?

programme.title: Team Zenko Go
programme.desc: When Rodney heads to the Community Center for Junior Security Cadet picture day, TZG secretly helps him stay neat and clean for the photo shoot. / When Luis worries about his first ever math test, TZG secretly helps steady his nerves.

programme.title: Dew Drops Diaries
programme.desc: When the Dews find out their glitter guide (an older Dew Drop) is coming to visit, they bend over backwards to make a great first impression, but end up forgetting some of their responsiblities in the process. / When a string breaks on Marcus’ piano before his recital and he can’t practice, the Dews must lead Marcus to a new piano.

programme.title: Go, Dog. Go!
programme.desc: Based on PD Eastman's classic children’s book, Go, Dog. Go! Follows 6-year-old dog, Tag Barker, on her hilarious adventures in the city of Pawston, a fun-loving community of dogs on the go. Tag is a skilled mechanic and loves anything that goes. With her ingenuity and creativity, Tag can go as far as any plan will take her, always with her best friend, Scooch Pooch, by her side. Scooch’s easy-going nature is the perfect counterbalance to Tag’s high-octane energy. But as much as Tag loves to go, she’s often reminded that it's family, friends and neighbors that really fuel a community.

programme.title: Go, Dog. Go!
programme.desc: When Tag and Scooch learn that Sandra Paws' sleigh broke down on a mountain, they have to go on an adventure to fix the sleigh and save Sniffs-mas! Meanwhile, Beans tries to get a grumpy Frank to feel the Sniffs-mas spirit.

programme.title: Dawn of the Croods
programme.desc: Gran is sick of the Croods not listening to her advice and fakes her own death. But, when the Croods don't mourn to her liking, she haunts them/Ahhh! Valley threatens to exile Sandy after a string of bad behavior unless the Croods can get her under control

programme.title: Dawn of the Croods
programme.desc: Eep gets struck with the crush curse when cute new guy, Kevin, comes to Ahhh! Valley. Her and Grug do everything they can to break the curse's hold/ Thunk starts to hang out with liyotes against Grug's wishes when he has a hard time fitting in with kids from school.

programme.title: Dawn of the Croods
programme.desc: Amber announces that math is the new skill that every hunter must have. Grug cannot seems to grasp the concept and enlists Squawk to help him/Grug and Snoot ban dancing when it causes a rock slide. Eep sets up an underground dance club against the adults' wishes.

programme.title: Dawn of the Croods
programme.desc: When Ugga's new surprise attack fails, and she comes home in a bad mood, Thunk tries to cure it by finding a happy surprise for his mom/ Eep stays up all night to see the mysterious and rare Night Mare (a horse with a rainbow mane) when she's teased for thinking they're not real.

programme.title: Dawn of the Croods
programme.desc: Eep joins the Scream-Leading team and starts picking up characteristics of her coach, Meep, much to Ugga's chagrin/Meep kicks Snoot out of the cave for not being a brave hunter. The Croods reluctantly take Snoot in and try to make him into a hunter to get him out of their home.

programme.title: Dawn of the Croods
programme.desc: Eep & Thunk want to be in on the new fad of Slateboarding, but must find something to trade with (eggs). Bud and Crud try to corner the egg market/Gran takes in a group of crabby tabbies, and uses their combined crabbiness to get whatever she wants. Grug and Ugga try to get into Snoot's food-sharing party.

programme.title: Spirit Riding Free
programme.desc: A wild horse Spirit and a soontobe city girl Lucky become friends in a frontier town

programme.title: Spirit Riding Free
programme.desc: Lucky Spirit and Turo team up to help save an abused horse

programme.title: Spirit Riding Free
programme.desc: When a sudden blizzard hits Miradero, Lucky and Maricela must work together to save the town.

programme.title: Spirit Riding Free
programme.desc: Grayson wrangles Spirit "fair and square" and sends him to auction in another town --and there is nothing Lucky can do to stop him!

programme.title: Spirit Riding Free
programme.desc: Spirit and Lucky desperately try to find a way back to one another.

programme.title: Spirit Riding Free
programme.desc: The girl’s plans to attend the Governor’s Ball are waylaid when they save a pregnant horse.

programme.title: Dragons: Defenders of Berk
programme.desc: Snotlout is concerned when his dragon’s flame goes out and the kids have to figure out how to reignite it before it’s too late.

programme.title: Dragons: Defenders of Berk
programme.desc: Once every 10 years, a mysterious glowing dragon visits Berk and this year Hiccup and Astrid are determined to find out where it's coming from – and stop it from reaching the village.

programme.title: Dragon 9 Realms S2
programme.desc: A mischievous new breed of dragons called Vine Tails steal the Book of Dragons.

programme.title: Dragon 9 Realms S2
programme.desc: Tom and the riders must work together to rescue Eugene from a dragon’s nest.

programme.title: Dragon 9 Realms S2
programme.desc: Tom must rescue Olivia from the Hidden World when she winds up getting herself frozen by a pack of hungry Speed Stingers.

programme.title: Boss Baby: Back in Business
programme.desc: After Turtleneck is captured by Frederic Estes, Boss Baby and Tim attempt to rescue her, leading them to the terrifying "fun house" at the town fair

programme.title: Boss Baby: Back in Business
programme.desc: After Boss Baby is fired from Baby Corp;he attempts to navigate regular baby life in a Mommy/Daddy/Baby playgroup. Meanwhile;Tim does everything he can to avoid doing his homework.

programme.title: Boss Baby: Back in Business

programme.title: Oblivion
programme.desc: In *Oblivion*, Tom Cruise stars as a man on a journey of redemption in a future Earth. Directed by the creator of *TRON: Legacy*, it’s a visually stunning sci-fi adventure about confronting the past to save humanity.

programme.title: Rambo: First Blood Part II
programme.desc: John Rambo is released from prison by the government for a top-secret covert mission to the last place on Earth he’d want to return - the jungles of Vietnam.

programme.title: The Mummy (2017)
programme.desc: Tom Cruise stars in The Mummy, a thrilling new take on the legend. When an ancient queen awakens in modern times, she unleashes a terrifying force, sparking a battle across continents.

programme.desc: A brilliant but controversial research scientist becomes obsessed with his quest to create a humanistic machine, leading to a dangerous conclusion.

programme.title: The Hateful Eight

programme.title: Corner Office
programme.desc: Misanthropic worker Orson detests his lazy colleagues. He finds a secret, magical office that boosts his productivity and status, but his coworkers can’t see the room and grow to resent his success.

programme.title: Gods of Egypt

programme.desc: Ant revamps a 1972 beach buggy giving it a radical twist, but has he gone too far? And the scale of the farmhouse renovation starts to hit Ant.

programme.title: Flash Forward (China) (S1)
programme.desc: In Episode Two, our team considers the challenges of a world that is more fractured and divisive than ever.

programme.title: Filthy Fortunes (S2)
programme.desc: In a modern-day treasure hunt, Matt Paxton and his team gamble on finding rare, potentially valuable items buried inside cluttered, filthy homes.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid (S6)
programme.desc: A young family plan to build their forever home in Alabama. Can they complete this challenging build during the peak of hurricane season?

programme.title: Gold Rush (S16)
programme.desc: Forest fires threaten to shut down Parker's Sulphur Creek claim before he can get all the gold out.

programme.title: Expedition Files (S2)
programme.desc: Josh analyses the Patterson-Gimlin Bigfoot film with cutting-edge technology. Plus, was the Hindenburg airship disaster an accident or sabotage?

programme.desc: The top eight No Prep drivers kick off the Great 8 Individual Championships in Virginia, racing to win $100,000.

programme.desc: Nostalgia aims to represent Chinese traditional culture by revealing life in villages in the way of story-telling. programme.title: Night Walk
programme.desc: Frank is framed for murder after his girlfriend is killed in a tragic incident during their visit to the Middle East. He is sent to a prison where he meets a Muslim inmate who helps him plan for a prison escape to prove his innocence. When his friend suddenly dies, can Frank successfully escape and seek justice for himself?

programme.title: Iron Ball
programme.desc: This sports entertainment show brings the best special forces from Iron Squad to take on a new challenge – dodgeball. The 26 players will enter a fierce competition, until a strongest team armed with powerful athletic endurance and mental strength is formed. Witness how they compete in front of the star athletes and legendary dodgeball coaches!

programme.title: Extreme Ends
programme.desc: Extreme Ends is an action-adventure reality show featuring four celebrities and their special guests experiencing the diversity of Hong Kong! Join Filipino actor, model and swimmer Enchong Dee and his celebrity friend Ria, to explore the highs and lows of Hong Kong. They are eager to push their boundaries in this thrilling new adventure.

programme.title: Young IP Man: Crisis Time
programme.desc: Set in 1917, young Ip Man pursues his studies in Hong Kong. The school is held hostage on the day of an English speech competition, and as Ip Man decides to step up and fight the crisis, it is revealed that his master and his childhood friend are behind all this. Can he take them down and uphold justice?

programme.title: The Ultimate BROcation
programme.desc: A hilarious reality show about four famous male celebrities from different countries on an all-expenses-paid fantasy vacation in Hong Kong, tailor-made for the “bros”!

programme.title: RUTE:Toughness Redefined
programme.desc: The growing regional competition R U Tough Enough is searching for the toughest person from Southeast Asia. Join the search and meet some of the most mentally and physically strong individuals, leading up to an epic final showdown in Kuala Lumpur for the prize of US$15,000!

programme.title: The Fight Machine
programme.desc: Two young Canadians from starkly different worlds are each trapped in a life beyond his control. When they are pulled into the unforgiving underground bare knuckle fight circuit, their collision sparks a brutal journey of vengeance, retribution and self discovery.

programme.title: Iron Ball
programme.desc: This sports entertainment show brings the best special forces from Iron Squad to take on a new challenge – dodgeball. The 26 players will enter a fierce competition, until a strongest team armed with powerful athletic endurance and mental strength is formed. Witness how they compete in front of the star athletes and legendary dodgeball coaches!

programme.title: Detective Dee's Seven Deadly Sin
programme.desc: Detective Dee becomes embroiled in a series of murders that shake the Tang Empire. The killer invokes the "Seven Deadly Sins" to justify a twisted sense of justice. In his relentless pursuit of the truth, Detective Dee uncovers the mask of false righteousness and exposes the darkness hidden beneath.

programme.title: Jason's Table: Masterful Dishes
programme.desc: Chef Chen Zong-sheng demonstrates his delightfully deceptive dish: Carp-Shaped Giant Fried Prawns. As carp signifies fortune and prosperity, this dish is often served at weddings and celebrations.

programme.title: Oceanfront Property Hunt (S1)
programme.desc: Daren and Naana are searching for a turn-key home with a stunning ocean view. In addition, they need a location to open their dream roadside ice cream shop.

programme.title: Rachael Ray in Tuscany
programme.desc: Rachael prepares a hearty and healthy meal for her Italian friends, combining store-bought and homemade ingredients to make flavourful, protein-rich ramen bowls.

programme.title: The Mother Flip (S1)
programme.desc: After backing out of a deal that was too good to be true, Rebecca, Kristy and Roy are $10,000 down and desperate for a win to keep their crews working. They decide to roll the dice on a townhouse.

programme.title: Rachael Ray's Meals in Minutes (S2)
programme.desc: Rachael prepares a delicious Puerto Rican-style cold shrimp salad, also known as ensalada de Camarones, with avocado, corn and rice, that's perfect for serving as the weather turns warm.

programme.title: Theresa Caputo: Raising Spirits (S1)
programme.desc: While she is channelling, Theresa is also challenging herself by facing her fear of heights and encouraging her daughter to move into her brand new house.

programme.title: Robin Roberts Presents I Will Survive: The Gloria Gaynor Story
programme.desc: The film chronicles Gaynor's rise to fame, from her humble beginnings to becoming one of the most iconic voices in music history. The biopic will also delve into the personal challenges Gaynor faced.

programme.title: The Mother Flip (S1)
programme.desc: After backing out of a deal that was too good to be true, Rebecca, Kristy and Roy are $10,000 down and desperate for a win to keep their crews working. They decide to roll the dice on a townhouse.

programme.title: Rachael Ray in Tuscany

programme.title: Airline Wars
programme.desc: Utter chaos erupts when a man goes on the attack while waiting in the security line. A pilot is arrested for attempting to operate an aircraft while under the influence.

programme.title: As Luck Would Have It: Old Flames, New Fire
programme.desc: When her father, Michael Luck, becomes a person of interest in the death of his ex-business partner, Lisa must do whatever she can to help. This means she will need to enlist the aid of her mother, Gabbi.

programme.title: Don't Scream, It's Me
programme.desc: Fifteen years ago, Liz's ex-boyfriend, Drew, was caught robbing a bank. Now, he's in her backyard, asking her to hide him. She agrees to help, but only once her husband is out of the house.

programme.title: Zombie House Flipping (S5)
programme.desc: Chauncey turns the tables on Derek by buying a tiny house without consulting him. But when a garage conversion turns into a permitting mess, will this Chauncey Special turn into a Chauncey Nightmare?

programme.title: Ppang Car Road 2
programme.desc: From Seoul to Busan, this spectacular eating show takes place at famous bakeries/patisseries to give the dessert lovers the glimpse of tasty goodness of some of the most-coveted desserts of all.

programme.title: Building Batavia
programme.desc: In 1619, the Dutch took control of what is now Jakarta and tried to turn it into a tropical Amsterdam. How did they do it, and what remains of their grand plan?

programme.title: Pawn Stars (S24)
programme.desc: Rick tries not to slip up when making a deal on a pair of snowshoes used in World War II. Then, Rick and Corey get a blast from the past when they go see a hand cannon from the 1600s.

programme.title: The Secret of Skinwalker Ranch (S5)
programme.desc: The legend that warns against digging on Skinwalker Ranch becomes all too real as the team breaks ground near the Triangle.

programme.title: Hazardous History with Henry Winkler (S1)
programme.desc: You thought your job was tough? Uncover the dangerous gigs of the past – from mercury-poisoned hat makers to kids crawling through chimneys – and imagine the risks behind everyday jobs of old.

programme.title: The Mega-Brands that Built the World (S3)
programme.desc: The biggest names in computers go head-to-head in a race to create the first portable computers. Through massive failures and shocking alliances, they'll usher in their first-ever handheld device.

programme.title: History's Greatest Mysteries (S5)
programme.desc: The search for the most famous gold mine in the Old West has led many to perish in the pursuit of its elusive riches. Legend suggests the gold and the land it's hidden on are somehow cursed.

programme.title: Dark Marvels
programme.desc: Whether they're used to stop treasure hunters, body snatchers, or wartime enemies, booby traps are diabolical devices just waiting to kill.

programme.title: Alone (S12)
programme.desc: The remaining three survivalists continue to push their limits as they reach nearly a month in the Great Karoo Desert. One participant loses the use of a major tool and all their hope along with it.

programme.title: 3AM - The Office
programme.desc: The Hungry Ghost Festival is around the corner. A newcomer at a workplace offends the ghosts in his office building when he shows disrespect for the spirits on his first day at work. In the course of a night shift, the man and his colleagues working overtime experience spooky encounters that make them reflect on their behaviours and beliefs...

programme.title: Two Champions of Shaolin
programme.desc: Set in the Qing Dynasty, the Shaolin clan wants to overthrow Qing and restore the Ming Dynasty, while the Wudang clan is backed by the Qing government. The two renowned clans eventually set themselves up against each other, and a series of vicious fighting has just begun…

programme.title: 3AM - The Campus
programme.desc: A school girl joins two internet content creators in a horror video project filmed in an old building behind their school. The trio encounters a bullying gang and as events unfold, it becomes clear that the girl holds a personal grudge against the gang and is blinded by hatred to exercise justice, even if it means sacrificing the innocents…

programme.title: Vital Signs
programme.desc: Paramedic Wang partners with Ma after being reassigned to a new station. Initially, Wang disagrees with Ma’s unconventional methods, but over time, Ma helps him rediscover the true mission of a paramedic - saving every life.

programme.title: Pursuit of Vengeance
programme.desc: Kung Fu legend Ti Lung stars in the action movie as Fu Xue Hong, embarking on a epic journey of revenge for his father.

programme.title: Marco Polo
programme.desc: Mongolian emperor Kublai Khan is being assassinated while meeting with the Italian explorer Marco Polo. Marco Polo is appointed to lead the troops for the emperor to wipe out the anti-Mongol rebels. Yet, he is touched by these rebels who are resisting the Mongolian invasion of their homeland. Will Marco Polo stay loyal to the emperor?

programme.title: Ip Man- The Final Fight
programme.desc: The movie portrays the later life of grandmaster Ip Man in Hong Kong, including his romantic relationship with a singer after his wife died, much to his students’ opposition; his relationship with his eldest son who is also his student; and finally, his reunion with disciple Bruce Lee after the latter becomes an international superstar.

programme.title: My Young Auntie
programme.desc: An elderly landowner marries young Dai Nan to keep his inheritance away from his unscrupulous nephew before he dies. When Dai Nan brings along the deed to meet his other nephew, a series of amusing incidents happen with this “young” auntie, the nephew and his son. Kara Hui won Best Actress in the first Hong Kong Film Awards for her role as Dai Nan.

programme.title: Iron Bodyguard
programme.desc: Wang Wu, the head of a security firm Iron Bodyguard, meets a scholar who is a member of the Reformists, a group of scholars pressing for social reform in China at the end of the Qing dynasty. The Emperor actually supports such reforms but not the Empress Dowager. She orders the Reformists to be arrested and Wang Wu gets drawn into the politics.

programme.title: Super Inframan
programme.desc: Transformed from a young laboratory researcher, the thunderbolt-fisted Inframan must battle Princess Dragon Mom who wakes up from hibernation to conquer the earth with her army of mutant monsters.

programme.title: Life Gamble
programme.desc: Martial arts master Yu has retired for years but is invited to join force with another master Tao to fight against the four famous thieves and retrieve the stolen Dragon Jade. However, Tao’s real plan is to possess the treasure himself and kills Yu after he defeats the thieves...

programme.title: I Did It my Way
programme.desc: As the secretive, complex world of online drug trafficking increasingly targets Hong Kong, the police launches a risky and top-secret sting operation to bring down one of the most notorious drug lords in Asia.

programme.title: A Writer's Odyssey II
programme.desc: Struggling novelist Lu Kong Wen succumbs to a powerful temptation, plunging both himself and his fictional characters into an inescapable crisis. By rediscovering his purpose, he joins forces with his creations to heroically resolve a catastrophe that threatens both their worlds.

programme.title: Inexternal
programme.desc: Ming is brutally attacked at a veterinary clinic one day and falls into a coma. In coma, he is transported to a fantasy realm where an old Master Turtle teaches him ancient boxing skills to defeat an evil boss. Meanwhile, Ming’s mother finds a way to save her son…

programme.title: The 36th Chamber of Shaolin
programme.desc: Gordon Liu plays an anti-Manchu rebel who escapes to the Shaolin Temple and learns what it truly takes to become a martial arts master by challenging the 35 Shaolin Kung Fu chambers, eventually creating the 36th chamber himself.

programme.title: Dapat ka Bang Mahalin?
programme.desc: The story, which was based on a popular comic’s serial, closely resembled what would later happen in real life to local moviedom's favorite couple. Sharon and Gabby portrayed teenagers who eloped and got married against the advice of everybody.

programme.title: Ang Misis kong Hoodlum
programme.desc: When Andy marries Grace, he is surprised to discover that her family are staying with them. Andy becomes the "house-band" and serves his wife and her family.

programme.title: Hotshots (Digitally Enhanced)
programme.desc: This is a story of adolescent boys and girls and their early experiences in life and love. How they took life’s realities and learned its lessons. Starring the country’s top singer Gary Valenciano and matinee idol Aga Mulach.

programme.title: The Flor Contemplacion Story (Digitally Enhanced)
programme.desc: The tragic tale of the Filipino maid hanged for the murder in Singapore in 1995 not only called the attention to the plight of overseas workers everywhere in the world but also resulted in one of the most acclaimed films in Philippine motion picture history.

programme.title: Sabado Nights
programme.desc: This is a tale of love and friendship among three young women, whose lives centered on what they do every Saturday night.

programme.title: Paikot-Ikot
programme.desc: To help combat street crime,the government forms a task force made up of narcotics agents and private detectives. Rocky and Gracia are the best investigators from the civilian group.

programme.title: Burlesk Queen
programme.desc: One of the classics of Philippine cinema wherein screen ingenue Vilma Santos made her transition into matured actress. Into this world came the young girl who becomes its last shining star. But as her presence brought life into the old art, her own existence is endangered by the decaying surroundings.

programme.title: D' Godson
programme.desc: A parody of the film The Godfather (1972). A young boy (Niño Muhlach) wants to follow the footsteps of his godfather as a mafia boss by imitating his actions and behavior.

programme.title: Grease Gun Gang
programme.desc: A renewed ex-convict (Robin Padilla) decided to change his friends’ lifestyle after he came out of the jail.

programme.title: Hari ng Stunt
programme.desc: Hari Ng Stunt

programme.title: Una Kang naging Akin
programme.desc: Is there any way for Gabby to regain his other "memory" and remember the family he left behind?

programme.title: Init sa Magdamag (Digitally Enhanced)
programme.desc: This is a modern tale about woman. Her many moods. Her many faces. No matter who she was, happiness was not destined to be hers as all the events of her past eventually caught up with her.

programme.title: Ang Boyfriend kong Gamol (Digitally Enhanced)
programme.desc: Alice Dixson plays a rich woman who returns in the country with a plan to reach out to the poor and stop poverty. She decides to disguise herself so she can penetrate the poor community and in the process she meets Andrew E and falls in love with him despite their social differences.

programme.title: Pulis Probinsya (Pat. Omar Abdullah)
programme.desc: A cop from the province gets a new assignment in the big city. He was disappointed to find out that he would be living and working in a different turf where the games played are almost always deadly.

programme.title: Rubble & Crew
programme.desc: A flock of migrating ducks settles in Builder Cove! It's up to Rubble & Crew to help the ducks start moving south. // Motor doesn't want to visit Dr. Diwa at the Vet Clinic... so the pups build a special space just for her!

programme.title: Paw Patrol
programme.desc: Everest, the Turbots and a Space Rock get trapped in a cave. // Mayor Goodway goes missing and Mayor Humdinger causes havoc in Adventure Bay.

programme.title: Paw Patrol
programme.desc: Bears are asleep all over town! The PAW Patrol must work quietly to save the bears and return them to their cave. // With the farmers out of town, Mayor Goodway calls the PAW Patrol to wrangle the animals and control the chaos on the farmerless farm

programme.title: Barbapapa - One Big Happy Family!
programme.desc: Barbapapa and Lolita spotted a flying saucer approaching their house. // The Barbapapa have taken off aboard Bababam in the hope of discovering the planet of Baby Big Feet.

programme.title: Barbapapa - One Big Happy Family!
programme.desc: The Barbababies are bored, the rain is preventing them from playing outside. // Barbibul has created a clever decoder capable of translating the cries of animals.

programme.title: Tim Rex in Space
programme.desc: Tim and Kai try to uncover trinkets buried at the beach. // Tim has a clearout of all his old stuff, but soon finds not all of it is destined for the rubbish bin. // Tim, Tia and Tommy try to convince Mum and Dad to let them have a pet.

programme.title: Tim Rex in Space
programme.desc: The Rex family go on a road trip through the galaxy to get to Rocket World // Tim & Kai compete to get Terri's spare Space-Land ticket // Tim, Tia & Tommy decide to put on a talent show, but then they can't decide who should go first...

programme.title: Dora
programme.desc: Dora and Boots meet Shelly, a hermit crab missing her shell, who uses one of Boots' boots. Dora travels across the beach in search of her old shell. // Papi is having a quesadilla picnic, but he forgot the ingredients! Dora sets off to deliver them.

programme.title: Dora
programme.desc: Boots is too short to go on a ride, so he wishes to be bigger and becomes giant! Dora helps him go back to his normal size. // Backpack has something special for Dora, but she can't open! They travel to Abuela on Tallest Mountain so she can fix her.

programme.title: Paw Patrol
programme.desc: It’s the annual Jamboree Jamfest, but all of the fruit is carried off by ants! It's up to the pups to lure the ants to safety. // Zuma is on a wacky water rescue after Cornelius the pig goes for a ride on a windsurfing board.

programme.title: Paw Patrol
programme.desc: When Mayor Humdinger disrupts Adventure Bay with his "barking" kitties, Katie and the pups must rescue the town.

programme.title: Rubble & Crew
programme.desc: Mix and Motor's favorite TV star has a new movie playing in Builder Cove, if the pups can build place to watch it! // When Grandpa tells the pups about a secret buried treasure, they find out the key to finding this treasure is construction teamwork!

programme.title: Rubble & Crew
programme.desc: When Grandpa Gravel is feeling under the weather, Rubble & Crew step in to make his signature soup.

programme.title: Mr. Crocodile
programme.desc: Mr. Crocodile volunteers to help too many friends with their projects all at the same time. // Daisy and Mr. Crocodile invite a new friend, PomPom, to live with them.

programme.title: Barbapapa - One Big Happy Family!
programme.desc: The Barbababies want to invent like Leonardo da Vinci. // The Barbababies must choose between going to the pool or going for a bike ride.

programme.title: Tim Rex in Space
programme.desc: Tim, Tommy and Tia bird-sit the Bronte's MoonParrot.

programme.title: Tim Rex in Space
programme.desc: Tim, Tommy and Tia take on their parents at Tailball.

programme.title: Tim Rex in Space
programme.desc: Tim, Tommy & Tia find a lost toy and vow to return it to its owner.

programme.title: Tim Rex in Space
programme.desc: Kai is super excited to ride the Nebulator, but Tim isn't so sure.

programme.title: Barbapapa - One Big Happy Family!
programme.desc: Barbalala and the family life!

programme.title: Paw Patrol
programme.desc: Ryder and the PAW Patrol have to rescue Alex when he takes off on his new “super trike”. // Marshall proves he is a true hero when he stops to put out a real fire on the beach during a race against the clock for a trophy.

programme.title: Paw Patrol
programme.desc: It's Pie Swap Day! Humdinger sends Rocky Kitty to take one of Mr. Porter's tasty pies, so he can join the contest.

programme.title: Rubble & Crew
programme.desc: Rubble & Crew use their giant trucks to make awesome stunt ramps when Speed Meister challenges Mayor Greatway to a stunt competition // When power problems shut down Sierra Sparkle's show, the pups hop in their big vehicles to turn the power back on.

programme.title: Rubble & Crew
programme.desc: When Camila the truck driver needs a place to stop and eat, the pups and Café Carl have a fancy idea. But is it too fancy? // Park Ranger Rose and Rosie the goat are putting on a show! But when Rosie disappears, can the pups find her before showtime?

programme.title: Dora
programme.desc: Dora shows the twins a music box with a baila folklorico dancer who comes to life! Bailarina's adelita boots run away, so we need to get them back. // The sun won't set because it can't fall asleep! Dora needs to find Pillow Cloud so Sol can set.

programme.title: Dora
programme.desc: Dora, Boots, and Benny have to trek through the rainforest to deliver a big, delicate tres leches cake to Benny's abuela. // Dora and the Fiesta Trio investigate a loud, strange noise that caused them to lose their instruments.

programme.title: Rubble & Crew
programme.desc: Rubble & Crew switch to cleanup mode when construction on Café Carl's new popcorn restaurant pops out of control. // A soapy accident causes slippery mayhem all over Builder Cove. Can the pups clean it up in time for Mayor Greatway's big jump?

programme.title: Rubble & Crew
programme.desc: Mix and Motor's favorite TV star has a new movie playing in Builder Cove, if the pups can build place to watch it! // When Grandpa tells the pups about a secret buried treasure, they find out the key to finding this treasure is construction teamwork!

programme.title: Paw Patrol
programme.desc: When a homemade Robotic Dino named Earl comes to life, the pups need to find him, stop him, and bring him home. // The pups are shooting their Film Festival entry until Daring Danny X cuts the action with his dangerous stunt.

programme.title: Paw Patrol
programme.desc: Daring Danny X is at it again! This time he’s stuck in a tree over a deep canyon and is pursued by hungry bears. // Mayor Humdinger sabotages Mayor Goodway’s perfect petals for the tulip contest. Chase and Rocky to the rescue!

programme.title: Barbapapa - One Big Happy Family!
programme.desc: The Barbababies are bored, the rain is preventing them from playing outside. // Barbibul has created a clever decoder capable of translating the cries of animals.

programme.title: Tim Rex in Space
programme.desc: Tim distracts Tia when Tusky is in the washing machine.

programme.title: Tim Rex in Space
programme.desc: The kids become the parents and the parents become the kids.

programme.title: Tim Rex in Space
programme.desc: Tim tries out some new rocket boots which soon fly out of control.

programme.title: Rubble & Crew
programme.desc: When Cafe Carl's pirate-themed restaurant gets caught in rough waters, the pups set sail with a new construction solution. // Sierra Sparkle calls in help from Rubble & Crew to build a special experience for all her fans in Builder Cove.

programme.title: Rubble & Crew
programme.desc: Rubble & Crew want to help open a new restaurant for everyone at the Buddy Walk Race... but they can't decide what kind of restaurant to build! // When Grandpa Gravel is feeling under the weather, Rubble & Crew step in to make his signature soup.

programme.title: Dora
programme.desc: The Queen of Reptiles is visiting Isa, but the garden's a mess! Dora helps her get everything ready in time for La Reina's visit. / Dora meets Sammy the Sloth, who needs to get to Day Camp on time so he can show everyone a special surprise.

programme.title: Mr. Crocodile
programme.desc: Mr. Crocodile wants to be a good guest at Daisy's birthday party since he's never been to one before. // Rushing to get to a concert on time, Mr. Crocodile and Daisy misplace their tickets at Mom's Box and Ship Shop.

programme.title: Tim Rex in Space
programme.desc: Tim tries to be at two parties at once. // Tim tries to find a bogweed free snack for Kai. // After losing again and again, Tia tries to win every party game.

programme.title: Rubble & Crew
programme.desc: Mayor Greatway and Mr. Ducky-Doo want to show their skydiving skills. But when wind gets in the way, the pups help them sky dive on the ground! // When Wheeler and Truffles the pig can't ice skate, the crew finds a construction solution with wheels!

programme.title: Rubble & Crew
programme.desc: Rubble & the pups find Grandpa Gravel's lucky bowling ball. Too bad Builder Cove doesn't have a bowling alley... until now! // When a sudden superbloom traps Motor, Lily, and Park Ranger Rose, the pups need a flower-friendly construction solution.

programme.title: Paw Patrol
programme.desc: When a baby caribou winds up speeding down a mountainside. It's up to the PAW Patrol to save the calf and reunite him with his family. / When Luke Stars gets blown away in a giant tumbleweed, Digi and Tal make a duplicate which dances out of control.

programme.title: Paw Patrol
programme.desc: When Cap'n Turbot's ship disappears, the Paw Patrol must venture into the mysterious Adventure Bay Triangle to find the missing vessel. // When Alex and Mr. Porter swap roles, the pups must help track down the Mini-Patrol after they go missing.

programme.title: Dora
programme.desc: Dora and Boots race their boxcar against Croc Racers in the Rainforest Race. / Dora and Boots secretly hand out Big Red Chicken's birthday invites to all their friends in time for his birthday party.

programme.title: Dora
programme.desc: Dora rescues Boots and her friends from Benny's out-of-control balloon so they can all go to La Reina's castle party.

programme.title: Tim Rex in Space
programme.desc: Tim tries out some new rocket boots which soon fly out of control.

programme.desc: Tim, Tommy and Tia bird-sit the Bronte's MoonParrot.

programme.title: Mr. Crocodile
programme.desc: When Daisy skins her knee learning to skateboard, Mr. Crocodile tries to keep her from ever getting another booboo. // Good sports Mr. Crocodile and Daisy face off in a game of soccer with bad sport Winston.

programme.title: Rubble & Crew
programme.desc: Rubble & Crew build the perfect place to show off River's ever-changing photography projects... Builder Cove's own art museum! // Farmer Zoe has a new goat on her farm! But when she can't find the singing goat, the pups team up with Park Ranger Rose.

programme.title: Rubble & Crew
programme.desc: Rubble & Crew are building their biggest construction project ever... a skyscraper! And a job that huge calls for brand-new, mega-sized construction vehicles! But when Speed Meister sees the pups' big trucks, he calls in help from his big brother.

programme.title: The Mentalist S6 7
programme.desc: Patrick Jane finally comes face to face with Red John, the serial killer he's tracked since the madman murdered his wife and daughter ten years ago.

programme.title: ContainER Wars S3 5
programme.desc: The Israelis' go hard after what they think is vintage clothing, but will their fashion expertise pay off? Mo and Ty go postal when the doors swing open to reveal some mysterious machinery, and a custom container could land at least one buyer behindbars.

programme.title: ContainER Wars S3 6
programme.desc: The auction turns into a circus when four containers bound for Russia's Winter Games miss the boat. A waterlogged container piques everyone's interest, but can anything inside be salvaged? Plus, a Major League Baseball player gives Mo & Ty the lowdown on a state-of-the art piece of gym equipment

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory S8 11
programme.desc: Leonard and Howard turn to Raj for help in dealing with a work emergency when they nearly come to blows after blaming each other for a potential disaster at the university.

programme.title: Friends S7 14
programme.desc: Rachel's 30th birthday prompts the friends to reminisce about their own 30th birthdays.

programme.title: The Fresh Prince of Bel-Air S1 2
programme.desc: Ashley's father wants her to continue with her violin lessons, but Will has other ideas.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers S4 12
programme.desc: Things get explosive when the guys revive some classic jokes at their own expense. Then, they go head-to-head debating nonsense in a humiliating elimination challenge.

programme.title: Reminiscence
programme.desc: A private investigator of the mind who can access lost memories searches for his missing lover in this stylish neo-noir sci-fi thriller.

programme.title: Mad Max 2: The Road Warrior
programme.desc: In the post-apocalyptic Australian wasteland, a cynical drifter agrees to help a small, gasoline rich, community escape a band of bandits.

programme.title: ContainER Wars S3 5
programme.desc: The Israelis' go hard after what they think is vintage clothing, but will their fashion expertise pay off? Mo and Ty go postal when the doors swing open to reveal some mysterious machinery, and a custom container could land at least one buyer behindbars.

programme.title: World's Dumbest S16 4
programme.desc: Not to boast, but we've got 20 of the World's Dumbest Show Offs and they're about to steal the show! From an out-of-control security guard to a dancer who kills it at a funeral - they all need attention, and they'll get plenty of it from our cast ofhilarious comedians, including Mike Britt, Rachel Feinstein and Gilbert Gottfried.

programme.title: The Mentalist S6 7
programme.desc: Patrick Jane finally comes face to face with Red John, the serial killer he's tracked since the madman murdered his wife and daughter ten years ago.

programme.title: Full House S1 21
programme.desc: Jesse succeeds when he secretly plans an Elvis Presley tribute at a nightclub. Meanwhile, Joey attempts to pay back money that Danny lent him 11 years ago.

programme.title: Full House S1 22
programme.desc: D.J. takes advantage of Joey's gullible nature by convincing him that she is sick so she can skip school and sneak down to the mall to get Stacey Q's autograph.

programme.title: ER S1 5
programme.desc: A man prepares for his impending death because a heart donor can't be found. Greene's wife gets a new job. Carter thinks he contracted an STD. Dr. Ross helps a girl with asthma.

programme.title: World's Dumbest S16 4
programme.desc: Not to boast, but we've got 20 of the World's Dumbest Show Offs and they're about to steal the show! From an out-of-control security guard to a dancer who kills it at a funeral - they all need attention, and they'll get plenty of it from our cast ofhilarious comedians, including Mike Britt, Rachel Feinstein and Gilbert Gottfried.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers S4 12
programme.desc: Things get explosive when the guys revive some classic jokes at their own expense. Then, they go head-to-head debating nonsense in a humiliating elimination challenge.

programme.title: Full House S1 13
programme.desc: Jesse suggests that D.J. audition for a commercial after she does well in a school performance. D.J. does well in her audition, but when she leaves the room, the part is given to Stephanie.

programme.title: Full House S1 14
programme.desc: Jesse uses baby Michelle to get a date with one of Danny's co-workers, but when a girlfriend of Jesse's tells the story of how she met Jesse with Michelle, Jesse's date is postponed indefinitely.

programme.title: Full House S1 15
programme.desc: Danny is excited about the chance to play basketball with the Harlem Globetrotters, but when his family contracts chicken pox, finding a baby-sitter for Michelle seems impossible.

programme.title: Full House S1 16
programme.desc: Joey's comic debut in front of a talent scout is jinxed when a member of the audience, Phyllis Diller, takes over his spot in the lineup.

programme.title: Full House S1 17
programme.desc: Three grown men experiencing the "joys of motherhood," as they raise three adorable girls in a Full House.

programme.title: Full House S1 18
programme.desc: D.J. is jealous of the guys when her cousin comes for a visit and spends most of his time roughhousing with Danny.

programme.title: Full House S1 19
programme.desc: Unbeknownst to the family, Jesse leaves the house after becoming frustrated because of his lack of privacy.Part one of a two-part episode.

programme.title: Full House S1 20
programme.desc: The girls devise a scheme to bring their Uncle Jesse home after he leaves the house to find some privacy.Part two of a two-part episode.

programme.title: Full House S1 21
programme.desc: Jesse succeeds when he secretly plans an Elvis Presley tribute at a nightclub. Meanwhile, Joey attempts to pay back money that Danny lent him 11 years ago.

programme.title: Full House S1 22
programme.desc: D.J. takes advantage of Joey's gullible nature by convincing him that she is sick so she can skip school and sneak down to the mall to get Stacey Q's autograph.

programme.title: Friends S7 10
programme.desc: Ross dresses up as the Holiday Armadillo and, with Monica, Chandler and Joey's help, teaches Ben about Chanukah. Phoebe worries that Rachel prefers living with Joey.

programme.title: Friends S7 11
programme.desc: Chandler and Rachel can't help eating the irresistible cheesecakes intended for a neighbor. Phoebe's former boyfriend returns for one night only, but Joey could ruin the romance. Monica plots revenge on her cousin's wedding day.

programme.title: Friends S7 12
programme.desc: Monica falls asleep during sex. Rachel argues with Tag. Ross and Joey get stranded on the roof.

programme.title: The Shining
programme.desc: Signing a contract, Jack Torrance, a normal writer and former teacher agrees to take care of a hotel which has a long, violent past that puts everyone in the hotel in a nervous situation. While Jack slowly gets more violent and angry of his life, his son, Danny, tries to use a special talent, the "Shining", to inform the people outside about whatever that is going on in the hotel.

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory S8 7
programme.desc: The guys try to help Penny out of an awkward work dilemma, when a smitten doctor shows up at her door after her flirtatious sales techniques work a little too well.

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory S8 8
programme.desc: When the gang recreates a high-school prom night on the roof of the guys' apartment building, Sheldon feels pressure to participate in all the typical romantic traditions.

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory S8 9
programme.desc: When Leonard gets minor surgery on his nose, Sheldon has a major overreaction. Meanwhile Howard and Bernadette work on their marriage in light of Raj's parents' impending divorce.

programme.title: The Notebook
programme.desc:
Behind every great love is a great story.
In Seabrook, South Carolina in the 1940s, teenaged debutante Allie Hamilton and local boy Noah Calhoun spend one passionate, carefree summer together and deeply in love. But when the summer ends, war and duty separate the young couple.
Today, an elderly man visits a nursing home to read from his notebook to a woman whose memory is fading. As he spins a tale of two young lovers with their whole lives before them, his beloved Allie relives a long-ago passion that has never died, an unbreakable bond between two ordinary people rendered extraordinary by the strength, power and beauty of true love.
Based on the novel by Nicholas Sparks, author of A Walk to Remember and Message in a Bottle.

programme.title: Journey to the CentER of the Earth
programme.desc: During a scientific expedition to Iceland, scientist Trevor Anderson (Fraser-- Crash, The Mummy), his nephew Sean (Josh Hutcherson) and their local guide, Hannah (Anita Briem), are trapped in a cave -- from which their only escape is to go deeper, into unimagined worlds, where the trio comes face to face with never-before-seen creatures and harrowing dangers as they race an building volcanic eruption to reach the surface!
